positive: A whimsical, highly detailed celestial map illustration featuring stylized geometric constellations (e.g., the Serpent, the Plough, the Great Bear) connected by glowing, subtle golden threads. The overall aesthetic is neo-art deco astronomy meets mystical botanical drawing. The central composition is dominated by a stylized crescent moon and several star clusters depicted as intricate, glowing floral mandalas. Color palette: deep indigo, midnight blue, dusty rose, muted teal, highlighted by glowing gold and luminous pearl white. Style: Line art, engraving, etching, mixed with modern flat design elements. Composition: Symmetrical, centered, highly illustrative. Lighting: Cinematic, ethereal glow emanating from the star areas. Suitable for printing on soft goods. Minimal background distractions, focusing on the complex line work.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, blur, artifact, low quality, grain, grainy, fuzzy, dirty, deformed, bad anatomy, extra limbs, too realistic, photo, photorealism, bokeh, messy
